question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 20.00% on 2026-04-10 for the Metaculus question "Will there be a bilateral ceasefire in the Russo-Ukrainian conflict before 2027?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus community prediction on the Russia-Ukraine ceasefire question will be above 20% on April 10, 2026. The CP has been on a strong downward trend (31% → 20% over 5 weeks) and currently sits exactly at the 20.00% threshold. Fresh negative developments — Russia rejecting Ukraine's Easter ceasefire proposal on March 31, peace talks still paused due to the Iran war, and no trilateral meeting scheduled — favor continued downward pressure. However, the CP being right at the threshold means even small positive fluctuations could push it above 20%, and cross-platform markets (Manifold at ~25.5%) suggest some forecasters may view 20% as too pessimistic for a full-year question. The balance tips toward NO given the strong momentum and negative news flow, but genuine uncertainty exists at this boundary.

factors.description: Strong downward CP trend: 31% → 20% over 5 weeks, with 10-point drop in last 2 weeks alone. Momentum favors continued decline.
Russia rejected Ukraine's Easter ceasefire proposal on March 31 — fresh negative catalyst that should push pessimistic forecasters to update downward
Peace talks formally on pause since mid-March due to Iran war; no trilateral meeting scheduled; disagreement on location
CP is exactly at the threshold (20.00%). Random noise/individual forecaster updates could push it either direction. Being right at the boundary means even tiny moves matter.

Cross-platform signal: Manifold ceasefire-in-2026 market at ~25.5%, suggesting some forecasters may consider 20% too low for a full-year question with 8+ months remaining. Could provide mild upward pressure on Metaculus CP.
Large forecaster base (929) provides stability — CP unlikely to swing dramatically in either direction in 10 days without a major news catalyst
Possible positive catalyst: Zelensky expressed hope for talks 'in coming weeks'; if talks resume before April 10, some forecasters might update upward

reasoning:
**Forecast: 38% probability that the CP will be above 20% on April 10, 2026.**

Key reasoning:
- **Downward momentum is strong**: CP fell from 31% to 20% in 5 weeks, with the sharpest drop in the most recent 2 weeks
- **Fresh negative news**: Russia rejected Ukraine's Easter ceasefire proposal on March 31; peace talks remain on pause due to the Iran war
- **Threshold proximity creates uncertainty**: At exactly 20.00%, even small fluctuations matter — this prevents a very confident NO call
- **Cross-platform divergence**: Manifold prices the underlying ceasefire probability at ~25.5%, suggesting some upward pull is possible
- **Status quo favors NO**: Exactly 20.00% resolves NO; an active upward move is needed

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/41138) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-10 23:41:24 is higher than 20.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 20.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-10 23:41:24, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
